feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Modify one column of internal table using variable value
entry.content:
If you are trying to modify one or more columns of internal table by using variable value 

follow the below method to do it.

Declare work area (structure) of that same internal table 
Assign value of variable to the specific column. ex: ls_sample-name = lv_name_var

MODIFY lt_internal_tab FROM ls_sample TRANSPORTING name (column names) WHERE some condition.

ls_main_new_data-demd_n_due_date = lv_new_dn_duedate.
ls_main_new_data-bli_due_date = lv_new_bli_due.
*
MODIFY lt_new_demand_main FROM ls_main_new_data TRANSPORTING bli_due_date demd_n_due_date
 WHERE bli_due_date = '00000000' AND demd_n_due_date = '00000000' .

entry.title: F110 & F-53 Enhancement
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

Need Enhancement name which will trigger on SAVE event of F110 & F-53.

 

Pradip Patel

entry.title: How to solve the error of SAP Editor Object not found?
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can anyone please help me with this issue?

As I was creating a Smartform and when creating a text in a window it is showing me such error and is not working properly.

And it goes to next process after pressing enter key several times but its too much time consuming.

Shreyash Deshmukh.

entry.title: Download PDF locally (SAP R3, 4.0B)
entry.content:
Hello experts,
The client I am working on has SAP R3 version 4.0B! The requirement is to download a PDF file locally. The file is stored in the application server. Function module GUI_DOWNLOAD is not available in ABAP thus I am using WS_DOWNLOAD. I use open dataset for output in binary mode but then I don't know how to use 

READ DATASET since there is no xstring-equivalent to read into. Has anyone got any idea how to approach this?

Thank you in advance,

Konstantinos

entry.title: How to bulk register multiple records via a custom Web API developed with RAP
entry.content:
Hi Exparts,

We would like to register multiple records at once to an add-on table in S/4HANA via a custom Web API for OData V2 developed with RAP.
I am trying a method using a batch request.
Although I can register multiple records at once, the save sequence seems to run one record at a time.
We don't want to register all the records if an error occurs for some of the records, so is there a way to process multiple records internally at once?
The technical background is that we use the Web API for interface, so we send batch requests from Integration Suite via the OData adapter.
The custom Web API was developed using the RAP generator.
When we run the RAP generator, the objects required for OData V4 are generated, but we were unable to send batch requests successfully with OData V4, so we only added the V2 service binding.

Best Regards,
Megumi Inoue

entry.title: Doubt for optimize abap code
entry.content:
Dear experts

How can optimize the following code :

 

 

 

    LOOP AT is_ee_org_ass_repl_req-org_assignment INTO DATA(ls_org_assignment).
	lv_fecha_inicial = ls_org_assignment-start_date.
        lv_fecha_final = ls_org_assignment-end_date.
	lv_posicion	ls_org_assignment-position_id

      SELECT SINGLE sobid  FROM hrp1001 CLIENT SPECIFIED  
        INTO (@DATA(lv_sobid) )
        WHERE  mandt = @SY-mandt and plvar =  '01' and
        objid = @LV_posicion AND ( begda <= lv_fecha_final AND endda >= lv_fecha_final ) AND subty = 'A012'

    ENDLOOP.

 

 

In the t,code ST12 appear the following log:

Regards

entry.title: Call transaction CJI3 with layout
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I'm calling CJI3 by using parameter ID's and "call transaction" statement (including 2 parameters that aren't shown in the F1 technical screen - KS7 & KS8 for posting dates).

Now I'm also required to add another selection field - Layout.

I don't know if it has a corresponding parameter ID (F1 doesn't show anything nor its corresponding data element - SLIS_VARI.

If anyone knows what's its parameter ID it would be great.

An alternative should be submitting the program but it doesn't work. Nothing happens in the report and no results are shown. I'm using the following command: "SUBMIT rkpep003 WITH P_DISVAR = p_disvar AND RETURN."
Thanks a lot in advance!

entry.title: Need help! How to set ETag for a PATCH request with OData V2 Remote Client Proxy
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Good Day!

Currently I'm developing a feature in SAP BTP ABAP environment, which will communicate with our SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud system through API (remote OData) to update Product Master Data.

Precisely, I'm trying to update Change Master header data through this API. I'm using OData remote client proxy with Service Consumption Model and call to a PATCH request to achieve the desired outcome.

Now the thing is, when I execute the request, it said If-Match is missing. So I try to handle this by first calling a GET request to the same Entity (with same key), then get the ETag from the response header.

After that I add the ETag as the If-Match value and call the PATCH request again. But this time the response is "If-Match is requested but no ETag property was found" and it ends up with error.

I tried multiple ways, like using HTTP client only, or change the format of the ETag value. But none of them really helps.

I'll put the source code I used below for more details.

 

 

    DATA lo_resource      TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_resource_entity.
    DATA lo_request       TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_request_update.
    DATA lo_read_request  TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_request_read.
    DATA ls_patch_req_busi_data TYPE ty_patch_request_data.
    DATA ls_read_data TYPE ty_read_data.

    IF mo_client_proxy IS INITIAL.
*      mo_client_proxy = get_client_proxy( ).
      " Create http client
      DATA(lo_destination) = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement(
                                                   comm_scenario  = '<my_communication_scenario>'
                                                   comm_system_id = '<my_communication_system>'
                                                   service_id     = '<my_service_id>' ).
      DATA(lo_http_client) = cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination( lo_destination ).

      mo_client_proxy = /iwbep/cl_cp_factory_remote=>create_v2_remote_proxy(
                            is_proxy_model_key       = VALUE #( repository_id       = 'DEFAULT'
                                                                proxy_model_id      = gc_proxy_model_id-cma
                                                                proxy_model_version = '0001' )
                            io_http_client           = lo_http_client
                            iv_relative_service_root = '' ).
    ENDIF.

    " Navigate to the resource and create a request for the update operation
    lo_resource = mo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set(
                    'A_CHANGE_MASTER' )->navigate_with_key( ms_entity_key ).

    " Get Etag
    lo_read_request = lo_resource->create_request_for_read( ).
    DATA(lo_read_response) = lo_read_request->execute( ).
    DATA(lv_etag) = lo_read_response->get_etag( ).

    lo_request = lo_resource->create_request_for_update( /iwbep/if_cp_request_update=>gcs_update_semantic-patch ).

    lo_request->set_if_match(   " <--- Error will be raised at this step
      EXPORTING
        iv_etag = lv_etag    " Not working
*        iv_etag = |W/"{ lv_etag }"|   " Not working
*        iv_etag = |W/'{ lv_etag }'|   " Not working
*        iv_etag = |W/"'{ lv_etag }'"|   " Not working
*        iv_etag = '*'                 " Not working
    ).

    ls_patch_req_busi_data = CORRESPONDING #( ms_business_data ).
    lo_request->set_business_data(
      EXPORTING
        is_business_data            = ls_patch_req_busi_data
        it_provided_property        = me->get_entity_properties( ls_patch_req_busi_data ) ).

    " Execute the request
    lo_request->execute( ).

I really needs help for this point, maybe I messed up something in between? Hopefully someone can show me the way.

Thanks a lot in advance!

entry.title: I want to restrict to a fewer line items for Std odata service SD_PRICING_CONDITIONRECORD
entry.content:
Hi All,

I  want to restrict to a fewer line items for odata service SD_PRICING_CONDITIONRECORD which is used in Fiori App Manage Prices ( Sales  ) . Could you please let me know the best way for this.

1) Copy the standard Odata service into custom and create a new FIORI  app or 

2) Is  there any way that can we control the Output of standard fiori app Fiori App Manage Prices ( Sales  ).

I know we can add additional Fields using Custom Fields and Logic app .  But my question is different I want to add additional logic to the standard odata service so that I can get only records based on some condition.

 

Thanks,

Bala

entry.title: When Post Goods Issue skip COGS split items with condition
entry.content:
Hello,

I have to deactivate the COGS split if the item has a condition = 'X'  when we Post Goods Issue, but I cannot find where I can do it, if it's a customizing matter or I have to do some BADI or Enhancement...

Do you know somehow?

entry.title: Issues with CDS View Entity
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am trying to create below CDS view entity, but getting error at lbkum field. This is due to reference information missing for unit of measure. 

Its allowing , If I create CDS view with same code but iF I want to create CDS View Entity, the code is failing. Please help how to fix the issue.

 

//@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZTESTMBEW10'

//@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED

@EndUserText.label: 'Material DATA'

@VDM.viewType: #CONSUMPTION

 

define view entity ZTEST_MBEW_10

as select from Mbv_Mbew as A1

left outer join marc as A2

on A1.matnr = A2.matnr

and A1.bwkey = A2.werks

 

{

A1.matnr,

A1.bwkey,

A1.lbkum,

A2.prctr

}

 

Regards,

Vasu

entry.title: Editable custom field in line item @ ME51N
entry.content:
Hi,

We need to display our custom Z fields(created in EBAN table using Z append structure) at line item level in ME51N/ME52N(PR creation and change).While the custom fields are getting displayed at line item level, but this could not be edited or shown at line item level as editable columns in ME51/ME52N(please find attached "PR Line Item" screen shot attached).

Did R&D in SDN community and some debug, found that below were some of our observations:

1. While debugging and from understanding from SDN, in program SAPLMEGUI(include LMEGUICJM), method BUILD_DYNPRO_FIELDS (LCL_REQ_ITEM_GRID) in MY_DYNPRO_FIELDS. If we change the metafield and make fieldcatalog(gt_fieldcatalog) EDIT for our custom fields as X, then these columns are displayed editable(please find "Debug1","Debug2","Debug3" screen shot for this).

2. Searched in SPRO settings to achieve this(as understood from SDN), SPRO--> Material Management-->Purchasing-->Purchase Requisition-->Define Screen Layout at Document Level. But here also we could not see our custom fields.

3. We could see BADI such as MEGUI_GRID_ENHANCEMENT for enabling our custom field metafield and fieldcatalogue(But here it is mentioned as "SAP Internal")

Doubt:

1. Adding editable custom fields - Is this possible via SPRO?

2.If not possible via SPRO, Is there any BADI which supports this case

3.If not possible, is it advisable to create any implicit enhancement in MEGUI_GRID_ENHANCEMENT implementation or so

With Regards,
Jagan

entry.title: How to display an attribute of a class, which belongs to a previous step in the stack
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

To display a variable, which belongs to a pervious step in the stack, I can write (<program name>)<variable name>

I want to display an attribute (public) of a class, which belongs to a previous step in the stack.

I tried  (<name of the class>=============CP) <attribute name>    for example (zcl=============CP)<attribute name>

But it did not work

I also tried (<name of the class>=============CP)<name of the class>=> <attribute name>

But in vain.

Do you have any suggestion?

Thankyou

Hagit

entry.title: SAP ABAP-translation standard toolbar
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP Community 

When I open my session from the previous session,my standard toolbar remains partially in Turkish.

How can I fix this?

thanks,

entry.title: Not getting data in read entity for multiple entities
entry.content:
Here, i have a BO architecture as travel entity have a child as booking have a child as bookingsupplement.

I have 4 booking instances for travel id = 00000001. upon reading with first statement black boxed in ss (attached below) I can get 4 records in lt_result internal table. that's correct !!!

but when I try with the second statement red box, I am getting 1 record in lt_travel but 0 entries in lt_book internal table. My expectation is for a particular traveled eg. 000001, I should get all bookings and then for all those bookings in lt_book I should get booking supplements.  How should I proceed further and why it is behaving like this ?

entry.title: BSP: Problem displaying icon using ITERATOR
entry.content:
Hi!

   I included a column to display icon but I have a problem with the presentation. The icons are not displayed correctly.

Thanks!
The attached shows the logic used.

Class ITERATOR

Method : IF_HTMLB_TABLEVIEW_ITERATOR~RENDER_CELL_START

            WHEN 'CONTROL'.
              ASSIGN COMPONENT p_column_key OF STRUCTURE <fs> TO <l_field>.
              if <l_field> is assigned .
                wf_text = <l_field> .
              endif .
              if wf_text eq '@0A@'.
                figure_ctrl = 'Triste.png'.
              elseif wf_text eq '@09@'.
                figure_ctrl = 'Media.png'.
              elseif wf_text eq '@08@'.
                figure_ctrl = 'Feliz.png'.
              endif.
              icon_ctrl = CL_BSP_MIMES=>SAP_ICON( id = figure_ctrl ).
              p_replacement_bee = CL_HTMLB_IMAGE=>FACTORY( id = p_cell_id src = icon_ctrl ).

BSP (Layout and MIMEs) 

(Print 1)

Icons: 

 Feliz.png      Triste.png 

Screen. It does not show the correct icon.

(Print 2)

entry.title: Sales Order Data transfer from sap to outer external Server
entry.content:
API

As a newbie ABAP developer, I need to transfer sales order (standard fields) data from SAP to an external server.

I'm required to use a POST API method for this data transfer.

Could you please guide me on the necessary steps or provide me with resources on how to achieve this?

entry.title: Skip Step in Flexible Workflow for purchase Order
entry.content:
Hello All,

How do i skip the Approval step where Agent is same in the list of Previous approvers?

I am busing BADI "MMPUR_WORKFLOW_AGENTS_V2" to determine agents 

Can someone please guide me on this?

Thanks You.

entry.title: How can get the two last record of a internal table and pass to other table?
entry.content:
Dear experts:

How can get the two last record of a internal table and pass to other table?

I have those two options:

 

 

DATA: it_tabla_interna TYPE TABLE OF your_type, " Table original
      it_tabla_destino TYPE TABLE OF your_type,  " Table target
      lv_count TYPE i.

lv_count = lines( it_tabla_interna ).

IF lv_count >= 2.
  READ TABLE it_tabla_interna INDEX lv_count TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
  IF sy-subrc = 0.
    APPEND it_tabla_interna[ lv_count ] TO it_tabla_destino.
  ENDIF.


  READ TABLE it_tabla_interna INDEX lv_count - 1 TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.
  IF sy-subrc = 0.
    APPEND it_tabla_interna[ lv_count - 1 ] TO it_tabla_destino.
  ENDIF.

ENDIF.

 

And I have other option using LOOP and with access Indice:

 

 

DATA: it_tabla_interna TYPE TABLE OF your_type,  " Table original
      it_tabla_destino TYPE TABLE OF your_type,  " Tabla target
      lv_count TYPE i.

lv_count = lines( it_tabla_interna ).


IF lv_count >= 2.


  APPEND it_tabla_interna[ lv_count ] TO it_tabla_destino.


  APPEND it_tabla_interna[ lv_count - 1 ] TO it_tabla_destino.

ENDIF.

 

However I want know if exist other options different?

Regards

entry.title: 12 Tips for Beginners Starting with SAP ABAP Programming
entry.content:
Welcome to Our SAP ABAP Programming Guide!

Are you starting your journey into the world of SAP ABAP programming? You've come to the right place! In this post, we’ve compiled 12 essential tips to help you navigate the initial steps of learning ABAP. Whether you're a complete beginner or have some basic knowledge, these tips will provide you with a solid foundation to build your skills.

12 Tips for Beginners Starting with SAP ABAP Programming

1. Understand the Basics of SAP
Before diving into ABAP, familiarize yourself with the fundamentals of SAP. Learn about SAP modules, the ERP system, and how different components interact.

2. Learn the Syntax and Structure
Start by understanding the basic syntax and structure of ABAP. Get comfortable with keywords, data types, and basic programming constructs.

3. Use the ABAP Development Tools (ADT)
Get accustomed to using ABAP Development Tools in Eclipse. It’s essential for efficient development and offers features like syntax highlighting, code completion, and debugging tools.

4. Understand Data Dictionary Objects
Learn how to work with Data Dictionary (DDIC) objects such as tables, views, data elements, and domains. These are crucial for database interactions in ABAP.

5. Practice Modularization Techniques
Master the use of subroutines, function modules, methods, and classes to write modular and reusable code. This will make your programs more maintainable and efficient.

6. Get Familiar with Internal Tables
Internal tables are a key feature in ABAP for handling data in-memory. Practice creating, populating, and manipulating internal tables.

7. Understand ALV Reports
Learn how to create and customize ALV (ABAP List Viewer) reports. ALV provides a flexible way to output data with features like sorting, filtering, and layout customization.

8. Explore Open SQL
SAP ABAP uses Open SQL for database operations. Learn the basics of SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE statements, and how to handle database transactions.

9. Practice Debugging
Get comfortable with the debugging tools in ABAP. Knowing how to effectively debug your code is crucial for identifying and fixing issues.

10. Learn About BAPIs and RFCs
BAPIs (Business Application Programming Interfaces) and RFCs (Remote Function Calls) are essential for integrating different SAP systems. Understand how to use them to enable communication between systems.

11. Get Hands-On with Enhancements and Exits
Learn about user exits, BADI (Business Add-Ins), and enhancement spots to customize and extend standard SAP functionality.

12. Engage with the SAP Community
Join the SAP community through forums, blogs, and SAP’s official website. Engaging with experienced professionals can provide valuable insights and help you stay updated with the latest developments.
